feedback: Phase 2 Subphase 3 is complete. All 7 built-in tools (read, write, edit, bash, grep, find, ls) are fully implemented with correct attributes (name, label, description, parameters, execution_mode), async execute() methods, abort signal support, and proper error handling. All 101 built-in tool tests pass, plus all 33 base tool type tests (395 total across tau-agent-core). Factory functions (create_all_tools, create_coding_tools, create_read_only_tools) return the correct tool sets. No outstanding feedback.
